author: gb9t
content:
**Phase B advance: net/ tier complete (second-largest subsystem).**

.design/net/00-overview.md (373 lines, 18 REQ / 17 AC, 3 open).

Coverage: 7/14 in-scope subsystems with Tier-2 drafts (arch + arch/x86, lib, mm, kernel, fs, block, net).

30+ Tier-3 docs spawned in nested subtrees:
- Top-level: socket-api, skbuff, netdev, struct-sock, bpf-net, fib, netlink, packet, unix-socket, netfilter, traffic-control, xfrm, ethtool, devlink, tls, mptcp, sctp, sunrpc, vsock, 9p-transport, niche-transports
- ipv4/ subdir: 00-overview + tcp, udp, icmp, igmp, fib4, fragment, multicast, raw, arp, gre-tunnels, mroute
- ipv6/ subdir (analogous)
- l2/ subdir: 00-overview + bridge, vlan, dsa, switchdev
- wireless/ subdir: 00-overview + cfg80211, mac80211, ieee802154 (FFI'd in v0 per Q2)
- bluetooth.md (FFI'd in v0 per Q3)

Compat slice owned by net/:
- All socket syscalls (BSD/POSIX surface)
- TCP/UDP/IP wire formats (RFC 793, 768, 791, 8200 + Linux extensions)
- /proc/net/* (tcp/udp/raw/unix/packet/route/fib_trie/arp/igmp/sockstat/...)
- /sys/class/net/<dev>/{addr,carrier,statistics,queues,wireless}/...
- Netlink + genetlink + nfnl + tc + xfrm + nl80211 + bt-mgmt + devlink wire formats
- Every SO_*/TCP_*/IP_*/IPV6_* sockopt
- ethtool ABI (every ETHTOOL_* command)
- devlink ABI
- kTLS SOL_TLS API
- All netfilter hook points + nft tables ABI

Verification:
- Layer 2: 6 TLA+ models (skb_clone refcount, napi_state, conntrack, tcp_state per RFC 9293, fib_rcu, rtnl_lock)
- Layer 3 (not mandatory but valuable): skb frag invariants, FIB trie LPM, conntrack hash exclusivity, TCP send queue ordering
- Layer 4 opt-ins: TCP state machine (Verus — RFC 9293 conformance is a strong functional-correctness target), netlink parser (Creusot), xfrm replay window, XDP verifier (cross-ref kernel/bpf)

3 open questions:
Q1: Network-protocol v0 port set — recommend 3-bucket split: full Rust port for net/core+ipv4+ipv6+netfilter+sched+xfrm+bridge+vlan+ethtool+devlink+tls+mptcp+sctp+bpf+xdp+sunrpc; FFI for wireless+bluetooth+9p+vsock+dsa; CONFIG=n for the long tail (~25 niche/dead protocols)
Q2: Wireless (cfg80211+mac80211) inclusion depth — recommend FFI in v0 (huge regulatory subsystem; tightly tied to drivers)
Q3: Bluetooth — recommend FFI in v0 (large; tightly tied to BlueZ)

All upstream paths verified.

Phase B remaining: ipc/, crypto/, security/, init/, io_uring/, virt/, drivers/, sound/.
